candidate.notes: same label 'wall feature' across non-adjacent places

object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.description: white baseboard trim along floor-wall junction
object_a.long_form_open_description: Painted white baseboard approximately 3–4 inches tall runs along the bottom of the walls; visible where the wood floor meets the wall in the hallway and door threshold. Clean, with slight shadowing where it meets the floor.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Runs beneath the hanging flag and continues toward the open door; forms the junction between the hardwood floor and walls.
object_a.object_text_short: white baseboard trim along floor-wall junction
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Painted white baseboard approximately 3–4 inches tall runs along the bottom of the walls; visible where the wood floor meets the wall in the hallway and door threshold. Clean, with slight shadowing where it meets the floor.

object_b.label: wall feature
object_b.long_form_open_description: Continuous white baseboard trim where the wall meets the floor, visible along the hallway and dining area. Provides a crisp contrast against the beige walls and wood floor.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Runs along bottom of walls throughout the visible dining and hallway areas
object_b.object_text_long: center sector | Continuous white baseboard trim where the wall meets the floor, visible along the hallway and dining area. Provides a crisp contrast against the beige walls and wood floor.
